case_title: NANE JEMO VS. YOUNG NAM DOKKO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2017 - CONTINUED FOR KOREAN INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO OCT-16-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NANE JEMO APPEARED. DEFENDANT YOUNG NAM DOKKO APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF NANE JEMO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOUNG NAM DOKKO IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY SONG AE PARK, KOREAN COURT INTERPRETER WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEMO, NANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOKKO, YOUNG NAM $1,521.20 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,671.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY JEMO, NANE AS TO DEFENDANT DOKKO, YOUNG NAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE TO OCT-16-2017 AT 3:30PM TO PROVIDE KOREAN INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVCIE $100.00 SERVED MAY-09-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOKKO, YOUNG NAM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DOKKO, YOUNG NAM
